{{Infobox group
| name = Deep Eye School
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Deep Eye School]] is a small sect of earth artists located in the mountains at the southern edge of the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20">''Soulsmith'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Deep Eye School]] consists of earth artists who sculpt stone.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Deep [[Eye]] disciples train by examining the [[aura]] of rocks and boulders.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
